name: mithril
description: Curated agent engineering methodology for planning, TDD, debugging, review, simplicity, and launch readiness.

scripts.lint:shell: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const fs = require('node:fs'); const path = require('node:path'); const win = process.platform === 'win32'; const bash = win && fs.existsSync('C:/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe') ? 'C:/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe' : 'bash'; const env = { ...process.env }; const bundledShellcheck = path.join(env.USERPROFILE || '', '.serena/language_servers/static/BashLanguageServer/bash-lsp/shellcheck'); if (win && fs.existsSync(path.join(bundledShellcheck, 'shellcheck.exe'))) env.PATH = bundledShellcheck + path.delimiter + (env.PATH || ''); const result = spawnSync(bash, ['scripts/lint-shell.sh'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); if (result.error) { console.error(result.error.message); process.exit(1); } process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test: npm run validate:skills && npm run validate:commands && npm run lint:shell
